app.title: PC Health & Security Dashboard
app.tagline: Monitor, clean, and protect your PC — safely and intelligently

login.title: PC Health & Security Dashboard
login.subtitle: Sign in to access your dashboard
login.disclaimer: Only your account can view your PC's data

dashboard.agentInstructions: Download and run the local agent on your PC to enable scanning

safety.confirmClean: Are you sure? A backup will be created before any deletion.

setup.heroTitle: Connect Your PC in 4 Easy Steps
setup.heroSub: No technical knowledge needed. Takes about 2 minutes.
setup.step1Desc: This is your unique key that links the app on your PC to your account. Keep it private.
setup.tokenNote: Don't share this token with anyone.
setup.step2Desc: Click the button below to download the PC Guard installer for Windows.
setup.windowsOnly: Free · Windows 10 / 11 · No technical knowledge needed
setup.step3b: When asked, paste your personal token from Step 1
setup.step4Desc: Once the installer finishes, your dashboard will show your PC's health and security status within about 1 minute.
setup.tokenError: Could not load your token. Please refresh the page.

errors.scanFailed: Scan failed. Ensure the local agent is running.
errors.loadFailed: Failed to load data. Please refresh.
